---
title: "Examples"
sidebar: examples
---

These examples show concrete inventory documents and API sketches using the DASDAE metadata model.

## Inventory Examples

- [Simple Inventory](simple-inventory.qmd): build a small inventory for a trenched and surface-laid fiber deployment.
- [Tunnel Deployment](tunnel.qmd): describe a mine tunnel deployment with borehole, trench, and coiled cable sections.
- [NORFOX](norfox.qmd): model a five-arm fiber-optic array with multiple cables, pipe enclosures, loop closures, KML-derived geometry, and co-located NORES stations.
